import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # Find yellow pyramid on the grid
    pyr_mask_n = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    pyr_count_n = jnp.sum(pyr_mask_n).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_y_n = jnp.sum(yy * pyr_mask_n).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(pyr_count_n, 1.0)
    pyr_x_n = jnp.sum(xx * pyr_mask_n).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(pyr_count_n, 1.0)

    pyr_mask_s = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    pyr_count_s = jnp.sum(pyr_mask_s).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_y_s = jnp.sum(yy * pyr_mask_s).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(pyr_count_s, 1.0)
    pyr_x_s = jnp.sum(xx * pyr_mask_s).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(pyr_count_s, 1.0)

    # Find green square on the grid
    sq_mask_n = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == SQUARE) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    sq_count_n = jnp.sum(sq_mask_n).astype(jnp.float32)
    sq_y_n = jnp.sum(yy * sq_mask_n).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(sq_count_n, 1.0)
    sq_x_n = jnp.sum(xx * sq_mask_n).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(sq_count_n, 1.0)

    sq_mask_s = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == SQUARE) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    sq_count_s = jnp.sum(sq_mask_s).astype(jnp.float32)
    sq_y_s = jnp.sum(yy * sq_mask_s).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(sq_count_s, 1.0)
    sq_x_s = jnp.sum(xx * sq_mask_s).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(sq_count_s, 1.0)

    # Agent positions
    agent_y_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_y_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)

    # Holding status
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)
    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)
    holding_n_f = holding_n.astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s_f = holding_s.astype(jnp.float32)

    # Phase transitions
    just_picked_up = (~holding_s) & holding_n
    just_put_down = holding_s & (~holding_n)

    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # ===== SUCCESS CONDITION =====
    # Pyramid on grid, not held, Manhattan distance == 1 from square
    pyr_on_grid_n = pyr_count_n > 0.5
    dist_pyr_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    success = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    success_reward = success.astype(jnp.float32) * 10.0

    # ===== PHASE 1: Not holding → go to pyramid =====
    # Use potential-based: reward reduction in distance to pyramid
    dist_agent_pyr_n = jnp.abs(agent_y_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(agent_x_n - pyr_x_n)
    dist_agent_pyr_s = jnp.abs(agent_y_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(agent_x_s - pyr_x_s)
    
    # Reward getting closer to pyramid when not holding
    phase1_active = (1.0 - holding_s_f) * (1.0 - holding_n_f)
    approach_pyr = phase1_active * (dist_agent_pyr_s - dist_agent_pyr_n) / max_dist * 3.0

    # ===== PICKUP BONUS =====
    pickup_bonus = just_picked_up.astype(jnp.float32) * 1.0

    # ===== PHASE 2: Holding → go next to square =====
    # Agent needs to stand adjacent to square to put pyramid adjacent
    # Target: agent distance to square = 1 (so they can place it adjacent)
    dist_agent_sq_n = jnp.abs(agent_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(agent_x_n - sq_x_n)
    dist_agent_sq_s = jnp.abs(agent_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(agent_x_s - sq_x_s)
    
    phase2_active = holding_s_f * holding_n_f
    approach_sq = phase2_active * (dist_agent_sq_s - dist_agent_sq_n) / max_dist * 3.0

    # Bonus for being very close to square while holding (distance 1 or 2)
    close_bonus = holding_n_f * jnp.maximum(0.0, (3.0 - dist_agent_sq_n)) / 3.0 * 0.5

    # ===== PUTDOWN REWARD =====
    # When putdown happens, reward based on how close pyramid ended up to square
    dist_pyr_sq_n_safe = jnp.where(pyr_on_grid_n, dist_pyr_sq_n, max_dist)
    
    # Large bonus if placed adjacent
    placed_adjacent = pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    placed_close = pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 1.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 3.5)
    placed_far = pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 3.5)
    
    putdown_reward = just_put_down.astype(jnp.float32) * (
        placed_adjacent.astype(jnp.float32) * 5.0
        + placed_close.astype(jnp.float32) * 1.0
        + placed_far.astype(jnp.float32) * (-1.0)
    )

    # ===== PYRAMID-SQUARE PROXIMITY (when placed) =====
    # Once placed, reward if pyramid is close to square (helps keep it there)
    pyr_placed_n = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n)
    pyr_placed_s = (pyr_count_s > 0.5) & (~holding_s)
    dist_pyr_sq_s = jnp.abs(pyr_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_s - sq_x_s)
    
    # Reward improvement in pyramid-square distance when pyramid is on ground
    pyr_placed_both = pyr_placed_n & pyr_placed_s
    placement_progress = pyr_placed_both.astype(jnp.float32) * (dist_pyr_sq_s - dist_pyr_sq_n) / max_dist * 2.0

    total_reward = (
        approach_pyr
        + pickup_bonus
        + approach_sq
        + close_bonus
        + putdown_reward
        + placement_progress
        + success_reward
    )

    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
